perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a light-colored dress stands in a warehouse store aisle, specifically in the pet section. She is holding a plush dog toy and looking at the camera with a smile. (2) The camera zooms in on a price tag and a shelf containing 'ZEUS Fitness Dog Toys'. The woman's hand points to the discounted price. (3) The woman holds a larger retail box of dog toys, displaying the product while gesturing and speaking enthusiastically. She remains in front of the tall warehouse shelving throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays. A young woman's voice begins speaking in Mandarin with an excited and friendly tone. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the speaking continues. Background warehouse noise like distant echoes and muffled movement is audible. (3) The voice reaches a higher pitch when emphasizing the price discount. The music loops smoothly as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and '寵物玩具' (Pet Toys) appear as a header. (2) Functional Text: '這個買完之後啊' (After buying this...), '旁邊這個從429元折扣到197元' (This one next to it is discounted from 429 to 197). Decorative Text: '半價半價' (Half price, half price) in yellow and red. (3) Functional Text: '你讓大狗狗把飛盤丟到水裡' (You let the big dog throw the frisbee into the water), '它們會超嗨的' (They will be super high), '夏天夏天很多大狗狗會去玩游泳池' (In summer many big dogs go to the swimming pool). Decorative Text: '完美組合' (Perfect combination) with star emojis.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the product
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair wearing a zebra-print bucket hat and a beige puff-sleeve dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with industrial shelving, wooden pallets, and bulk-packaged items stacked high.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about a specific discount on dog toys at Costco, leveraging a 'deal-finding' vlog style to encourage shopping. By highlighting the price drop and seasonal utility (floating toys for summer), it acts as a purchase incentive.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of price tags and product branding in a shopping environment.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical of micro-influencer content focused on bargain hunting or warehouse store finds.
